calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Dismissal
Off Calendar May-18-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT MARIE PAILLET'S Motion For Dismissal IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED ON APRIL 20, 2010. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Joyce D. Long, CSR # 8620 =301/PJB

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-25-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Leticia Perez. Daniel Bornstein, Esq. represented Santa Fe Associates and Thomas E. Drohan, Esq. represented Defendant, Marie Paillet. The case settled per written stipulation. Trial date is vacated.
